channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Notre sélection des meilleurs micros pour le podcast et le streaming
item.description: Vous souhaitez vous lancer dans le podcast ? Investir dans un bon micro est une étape indispensable. Découvrez notre sélection des meilleurs micros pour faire du podcast ou du streaming.

item.title: Starlink and Amazon could snap up EU mobile satellite spectrum
item.description: Viasat, EchoStar contracts end in one year – one-third of European satellite spectrum likely opened up to all, including Starlink, Leo.

item.title: The 7 best Ryzen 7 mini PC deals under $500 that are actually worth buying right now
item.description: For a desktop PC replacement, these 7 AMD-powered mini computers have the chops required for the job — and won't break the bank.

item.title: 'Essentially, they wanted us to read their minds': Roku is rolling out a huge free upgrade to the Home Screen on its TVs and streaming devices — and the company explains how it arrived at the new personalized, sometimes AI-driven, redesign
item.description: Roku unveiled its biggest Home Screen update in a decade, and it leans into personalization and some AI.

item.title: Glycémie sur Apple Watch : le projet devient enfin crédible grâce à ce changement majeur
item.description: Le journaliste Mark Gurman révèle qu'Apple a nommé un nouveau responsable pour son chantier autour de la mesure du taux de sucre dans le sang pour les Apple Watch.

item.title: Startup Battlefield 200 applications close today: Nominate a founder or submit your startup
item.description: Today is the final day to apply or nominate a startup for Startup Battlefield 200. Once the clock strikes 11:59 p.m. PT, the window closes on your chance to compete for $100,000 in equity-free funding, gain global visibility, connect directly with investors, and launch on the TechCrunch Disrupt stage.

item.title: ElevenLabs’s new music generation model can switch genres mid-track
item.description: ElevenLabs' new model will let users regenerate a section of a song without affecting rest of the track

item.title: VPN deal of the week: get Amazon gift cards worth up to $30 with 2-year Surfshark plans — exclusively for TechRadar readers
item.description: Protect your data & get a free Amazon gift card.

item.title: The shocking reason 43% of UK businesses have been hit by cyber attacks last year
item.description: Why some organizations are more exposed to cyber attacks than others.

item.title: YouTube Music améliore enfin le classement des playlists
item.description: 10 ans après sa sortie, l'application YouTube Music ajoute des options de tri des playlists aussi basiques qu'utiles. Il était temps.

item.title: 007 First Light : quelle configuration pour jouer au nouveau James Bond sur PC ?
item.description: Un nouvel action-aventure dans l'univers James Bond, ça vous dit ? Le prochain AAA de IO Interactive est disponible. Voici les configurations nécessaires pour y jouer sur PC.

item.title: Google joins privacy backlash and warns Canada Bill C-22 could 'break end-to-end encryption' and create a 'surveillance infrastructure'
item.description: After the privacy tech industry, Google and Apple are warning that Canada's proposed Bill C-22 could force developers to build backdoors into their devices, and push for strict judicial oversight.

item.title: Le paradoxe BYD : un casting de James Bond, mais des voitures technologiquement dépassées (pour le moment)
item.description: BYD a mis le paquet sur le marketing en s'offrant Daniel Craig pour promouvoir ses nouveaux modèles premium Denza. Mais sous le vernis hollywoodien et la promesse d'une recharge ultra-rapide, le leader chinois cache une réalité décevante : son intelligence embarquée date de 2023. Pendant que Xiaomi, Nio et Xpeng déploient des puces surpuissantes pour la conduite autonome, BYD semble avoir oublié de fournir les vrais "gadgets" technologiques à l'agent 007. Décryptage d'une stratégie risquée. ...

item.title: Spotify now lets you ‘clip’ moments from your favorite podcast
item.description: With the new scissors icon, you can clip favorite moments from podcasts and share them with your audience.

item.title: Microsoft Build
item.description: All TechRadar stories tagged Microsoft Build

item.title: Former Google and Apple Researchers Launch a Startup to Build AI’s Missing Feedback Loop
item.description: Trajectory is betting the rapid iteration cycle that supercharged vibe-coding can help all kinds of companies build AI products that learn continuously.

item.title: This smart bird feeder captures more of my backyard drama
item.description: Since moving to South Carolina's Lowcountry, I've been spellbound by the myriad of beautiful birds that share the coast with us - ospreys raising their babies in towering nests beside the road to my daughter's school, roseate spoonbills wading in the marsh on my morning walks, eagles circling over my son's tennis matches, and a […]

item.title: SOND, a sleep tech startup from Bose’s former head of sleep, exits stealth with $7M
item.description: SOND, a startup led by Bose’s former head of sleep products, emerged from stealth with $7M in funding for its AI-powered sleep earbuds.

item.title: TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 Early Bird ticket savings end in 3 days
item.description: There are only 3 days left to save up to $410 on your ticket to TechCrunch Disrupt 2026. Early Bird pricing ends May 29 at 11:59 p.m. PT, and once the deadline passes, ticket prices increase. If you plan to attend one of the most influential gatherings in tech this year, now is the time to lock in your pass before rates go up again.

item.title: This Ferrari should have been a Volkswagen
item.description: It may be the NBA playoffs but right now Ferrari is getting dunked on more than anyone. Whether they own a Ferrari or just have a poster of a Testarossa on their wall, fans in the Ferrari-verse are frothy about the Luce, the company's first all-electric vehicle. According to one highly rated Verge commenter: "looks […]

item.title: Xreal’s New $299 ‘xbx’ Smart Glasses Channel Xbox Vibes
item.description: These display smart glasses can connect to a phone, laptop, or gaming handheld and project the screen to your eyeballs.

item.title: China is increasingly keeping its best AI talent to itself
item.description: China's AI boom is producing world-class talent, and Beijing is increasingly reluctant to let them go elsewhere.

item.title: L’Europe s’apprête à freiner brutalement l’expansion de Starlink et Amazon
item.description: La course à l'internet spatial prend une tournure résolument politique sur le Vieux Continent. En bloquant la majorité des fréquences satellitaires mobiles pour ses propres entreprises, Bruxelles compte bien garantir sa souveraineté face à l'appétit de Starlink et d'Amazon Kuiper.

item.title: A phone is snatched every eight minutes in London — but iPhones could soon get this Android-inspired upgrade to frustrate thieves
item.description: iOS users might soon get a new feature designed to protect your private data from phone thieves.

item.title: 'The internet is not connected' — Iran's 88-day blackout begins to lift, but traffic remains under 50%
item.description: Internet in Iran is partially restored. But experts aren't ready to celebrate yet, warning that "it's too early" to say that the longest shutdown the country has ever recorded is over.

item.title: The State Department Really Doesn’t Want to Talk About the Office of Remigration
item.description: The office was created a year ago and seemingly named for a far right European plan to expel minorities and immigrants from Western nations. It now works, a source says, with little to no oversight.

item.title: L’Apple Watch capable de mesurer la glycémie serait en bonne voie
item.description: Apple travaille depuis des années sur un capteur de glycémie pouvant être intégré à une Apple Watch. Le projet a récemment été confié à Zongjian Chen, expert en technologie avancée, indiquant une potentielle avancée vers un produit concret.

item.title: Fin et endurant, le nouveau Honor MagicBook 16 marche sur les plates-bandes du MacBook Air et s’octroie une baisse de 200 €
item.description: Fin, léger et offrant une autonomie de 14 heures, le récent Honor MagicBook 16 concurrence clairement le MacBook Air d'Apple. En ce moment, Honor propose ce nouvel ultrabook à 999,90 euros au lieu de 1 199,90 euros.

item.title: iOS 27 : voici à quoi ressemblerait le Siri 2.0, entièrement repensé
item.description: Au travers d'iOS 27, Apple prévoit une refonte complète de Siri, assortie d'une nouvelle application, de nouvelles fonctions et, surtout, d'un tout nouveau design. On vous explique ce qui devrait changer... et à quoi ressemblera vraisemblablement Siri dans quelques mois.

item.title: Ducati is celebrating its 100th anniversary by launching a $2,000 Nespresso machine — and it's even stranger than it sounds
item.description: The more I learn about the Ducati Barista M3 1926 Limited Edition Carbon Fiber, the stranger this luxury coffee maker sounds.

item.title: AI’s true value is hiding in your customer conversations
item.description: How enterprises can transform raw customer conversations into a unified intelligence engine driving smarter decisions.

item.title: Finally, we have a new Fitbit — here's what the range looks like now, following the band brand's big Google shake-up
item.description: Wondering which Fitbit to buy, or if the brand even still exists? Here's what you need to know.

item.title: Ne l’appelez plus « slop » : Spotify défend la musique générée par IA
item.description: Le service de streaming audio Spotify mise tout sur l'intelligence artificielle et son patron aimerait bien que les utilisateurs arrêtent de râler à ce sujet.

item.title: Researchers say Google AI Mode changes recommendations based on your emails — and it risks creating a giant confirmation-bias machine
item.description: Researchers claim Google AI Mode may prioritize brands found in your Gmail inbox, raising fears that AI-powered search could a confirmation-bias machine.

item.title: 007 First Light is like a James Bond movie in the best way possible
item.description: The James Bond franchise is nothing if not a spectacle: Aside from the explosions and gun fights, even its calmer moments are dripping in the pomp and glamour of elite ostentation and luxury locales. Bond, however, has always been an odd mascot for the espionage profession, which ordinarily operates under silence and shadows. With 007 […]

item.title: Redmagic 11S Pro officiel : 140 MHz de plus que le 11 Pro, écran sans encoche et 7 500 mAh
item.description: Nubia officialise son Redmagic 11S Pro à l'international. Le smartphone gaming arrive en Europe à partir de 799 €, avec un Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 surcadencé, un ventilateur interne, du refroidissement liquide et une dalle entièrement sans encoche ni poinçon.

item.title: How to watch Crystal Palace vs. Rayo Vallecano online for free
item.description: How to watch Conference League for free. Live stream Crystal Palace vs. Rayo Vallecano in the Conference League final for free.

item.title: Chuwi AuBox X 256V mini PC review: A microcosm of where small PC designs are heading under the current price pressures
item.description: The Chuwi AuBox X 256V is a NUC-sized Mini PC with plenty of features and decent performance from its Intel Core Ultra 200 series processor.

item.title: UK Visa Portal website leaks thousands of user passport data and photos online
item.description: Passports, verification selfies and other supporting documents were stored in an unsecured cloud storage repository.

item.title: ClickHouse triples anualized revenue to $250M, charting a path toward an IPO
item.description: The database provider is eyeing a public debut within the next few years.

item.title: Spotify's latest feature makes it easier to share podcast clips
item.description: Spotify just released a new feature that find and share specific podcast moments.

item.title: A24s Primetime trailer teases Phoebe Bridgers acting debut
item.description: Watch A24's "Primetime" based on Chris Hansen and Dateline's "To Catch a Predator series, starring Robert Pattinson and Phoebe Bridgers.

item.title: Win cool gadgets we can’t keep because The Verge has ethics
item.description: When people learn I work for The Verge, they inevitably ask: “Do you get to keep the gadgets?” Now that I film Today I’m Toying With, a video series where I share the joy of tech, I get that question more than ever. The answer is no, we don’t keep them! Our ethics policy is […]

item.title: The best part of Mina the Hollower is how it randomizes the Zelda formula
item.description: After rolling credits on Mina the Hollower, I did something unusual for me and immediately started a new file. I'm not typically one to replay games right after I beat them. But Mina, a new action-adventure title from Shovel Knight creators Yacht Club Games, offers something that got me to jump right back into a […]

item.title: YouTube is putting AI labels where you’ll actually see them
item.description: In the wake of Google expanding its AI verification efforts at I/O, YouTube is now finally going to start taking AI labeling seriously. YouTube has announced that it's relocating AI disclosures on Shorts and long-form videos to make them easier to spot and will start automatically identifying and labeling AI-generated content on the platform. For […]...

item.title: YouTube will now automatically label AI videos
item.description: YouTube will now automatically label videos that use significant photorealistic AI, instead of relying solely on creators to disclose AI-generated content themselves. It's also making AI labels more prominent.

item.title: A24's Backrooms movie has a 'fairly simple' story, its director says — but the new horror movie doesn't dumb down 'all of the lore' that diehard fans love in order to appeal to a wider audience
item.description: The director of A24's latest horror film has had his say on some movie and TV adaptations don't deliver on their promises to fans.

item.title: Lizzo turned a Chili’s rib into a flute for one of the weirdest ads of the year
item.description: The Grammy-winning singer stars in Chili’s latest campaign, complete with rib microphones, a custom rib flute, and a revamped version of the chain’s unforgettable jingle. Lizzo’s latest song has a familiar, almost too-catchy riff. “I want my baby back, baby back, baby back . . . ”

item.title: Boîte de réception | Haute vitesse, boulangerie branchée et codes-barres
item.description: Chaque mercredi, notre journaliste répond à vos questions en lien avec le numérique et les nouvelles technologies. Cette semaine, on optimise le WiFi pour la haute vitesse, on magasine du pain à l’ère du numérique et on apprend à lire entre les lignes des codes-barres.

item.title: This Google alternative has a ‘No AI’ function. Search visits are soaring by double digits
item.description: In the wake of Google’s latest push to transform from a search engine into an AI-powered answer engine, DuckDuckGo says it’s seeing a lot more interest. On Tuesday, May 19, Google used its I/O developer conference to announce a new “intelligent AI-powered Search box” that includes information agents and space for follow-up questions.

item.title: 10 000 failles en un mois : Anthropic dévoile le premier bilan de Claude Mythos
item.description: En un mois à peine, l'IA de cybersécurité d'Anthropic, Claude Mythos, a identifié plus de 10 000 failles graves dans des logiciels utilisés par des milliards de personnes. De facto, les équipes de sécurité n'arrivent plus à corriger les failles aussi vite qu'il les trouve.

item.title: Enola Holmes 3 trailer sees Millie Bobby Brown back on the case
item.description: Sherlock Holmes' capable sister Enola (Stranger Things' Millie Bobby Brown) is back for a new case, and Netflix has an overtly romantic teaser trailer.

item.title: Meilleurs smartphones haut de gamme 2026 : nos recommandations et tests
item.description: Bienvenue sur notre sélection des meilleurs smartphones haut de gamme du marché, tous testés et approuvés, pour vous aider dans votre choix.

item.title: The long-awaited Fight Club 4K Blu-ray has finally arrived — but not only is it missing Dolby Atmos and Vision, it's also been the subject of controversy on Reddit due to David Fincher's changes
item.description: Fight Club has arrived on 4K Blu-ray and while it's been hotly anticipated, it's been met with some controversy on Reddit

item.title: Groupon layoffs today: Hundreds of jobs slashed in latest ‘AI-native’ tech company pivot. Stock price rises
item.description: The e-commerce platform says it has begun the initial phase of an automation-focused restructuring plan that could continue through 2027. Another tech company has announced that it will lay off a significant number of workers in an effort to become “AI-native.”

item.title: 5 passive income business ideas that require less than $1,500 to start
item.description: No matter your skill set, there are several types of businesses that let you earn passive income without a major financial commitment. No matter your skillset, there are several types of businesses that let you earn passive income without a major financial commitment.

item.title: The Witcher 3 is getting another expansion, more than a decade after launch
item.description: The fourth Witcher game may be a ways off, but fans won't be without Geralt of Rivia for long. CD Projekt Red just announced Songs of the Past, the third expansion for The Witcher 3, which will be launching in 2027. Aside from the title, there aren't many details about the expansion just yet. It's […]

item.title: I highly recommend Sonys new PS-LX3BT turntable for beginners — its on sale for its lowest-ever price
item.description: The new Sony PS-LX3BT Bluetooth turntable is on sale for $348 on Amazon (normally $399.99). That's its best price ever.

item.title: Tech CEOs are apparently suffering from AI psychosis
item.description: "CEOs are uniquely prone to AI psychosis," Box CEO Aaron Levie opines. Maybe that explains the almost religious belief in AI productivity gains.

item.title: Robinhood now lets your AI agents trade stocks
item.description: Robinhood will let users create a separate account with pre-loaded balance that an agent use to trade
